headline: Hospital Stocks Are Healing: 4 Names to Watch as Earnings Improve
summary: The Zacks Medical-Hospital industry is adapting as care shifts beyond inpatient settings, demand rises and earnings outlook improves. THC, UHS, ACHC and CYH stand out.
